mermaid_source:
flowchart TD
    Start(["🎯 Start"]) --> A["📖 Stage A\nRead SKILL.md"]
    A --> B["📋 Stage B\nBuild Artifact Plan"]
    B --> C["🎨 Stage C\nDesign Mermaid"]
    C --> D{"⚠️ Stage D\nMermaid Critic"}
    D -->|fail| C
    D -->|pass| E["⚙️ Stage E\nEmit HTML"]
    E --> F["🔍 Stage F\nStatic Validate"]
    F --> G["🌐 Stage G\nRuntime Validate"]
    G --> H["📊 Stage H\nExternal Critic"]
    H -->|fail| E
    H -->|pass| End(["✅ Done"])
    D -.->|route-out| Route["↪ Route-Out\ndelegate_to_skill_to_page"]

content_bindings.description: Transform a skill's SKILL.md into a self-contained, navigable HTML page — with Mermaid diagram, searchable accordions, TOC, theme toggle, and proof metadata.

steps.name: Read SKILL.md
steps.description: Read the target skill's SKILL.md completely. Extract frontmatter, workflow_steps, description, triggers, routing, terminal states, and artifacts.

steps.name: Build Artifact Plan
steps.description: Design the page structure from the workflow model. Emit artifact-plan.json with section order, content bindings, and ui_config.

steps.name: Design Mermaid
steps.description: Generate the Mermaid diagram from the normalized workflow model — not from prose. Apply layout rules, color-coded classDefs, and edge labels.

steps.name: Mermaid Critic
steps.description: Validate the diagram: zero edge crossings, all nodes labeled, all edges labeled, readable at 50/100/150% zoom. Gate: crossings==0 AND syntax valid.

steps.name: Emit HTML
steps.description: Assemble index.html from template skeleton files. Fill content slots from artifact-plan.json. CSS/JS come from templates only — never generated from prose.

steps.name: Static Validate
steps.description: Run S1–S19 regex checks on index.html: tocToggle sibling, nav#toc class, CSS properties, element presence, content-model binding.

steps.name: Runtime Validate
steps.description: Launch browser via browser-harness. Verify page loads, TOC visible by default, step header present, search input exists, Mermaid pre present, resize handle present, zoom controls, copy buttons.

steps.name: External Critic
steps.description: Run an independent LLM critic against the HTML. Contract checks: no_invented_routes, toc_initial_state_synced, toc_handler_atomic, html_represents_workflow_model, steps_complete, no_internal_policy_prose.

steps.name: Emit Proof Metadata
steps.description: Write workflow-model.json, artifact-proof.json, and diagram.mmd to the artifacts directory. Skill terminates successfully.

route_outs.trigger: skill-to-page invokes itself for nested skill documentation

terminal_states.name: Proof Emitted
terminal_states.description: All proof metadata written — skill terminates successfully.

artifacts.name: index.html
artifacts.description: Self-contained navigable HTML page with Mermaid diagram, TOC, search, theme toggle, accordion steps, proof summary.

artifacts.name: workflow-model.json
artifacts.description: Normalized internal workflow model — source of truth for Mermaid generation, accordion sections, TOC, and proof metadata.

artifacts.name: artifact-proof.json
artifacts.description: Proof metadata with coverage metrics, browser verification results, and critic gate pass/fail status.

artifacts.name: diagram.mmd
artifacts.description: Raw Mermaid source for the workflow diagram — validates against workflow model.
